category_sources: source_facts.description says Rust based DNS client, server, and resolver; official README says Hickory DNS is a DNS client, server, and resolver
display_name_sources: official README heading is Hickory DNS
docs_sources: official Hickory DNS User Manual is on hickory-dns.org/book; README states the source repository is also a source of usage information
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/hickory-dns/hickory-dns; per instruction repo is returned as null
tags_sources: official README lists Hickory DNS, Proto, Client, Server, Resolver, and Recursor crates and describes DNS server/resolver functionality
